name: Love Company
original_name: โปรเจ็กต์นี้ มีเดิมพัน
overview: Jin and Toy, once lovers, find themselves forced to compete on a major project. As chaos unfolds, will they be able to overcome the tension and reconcile, or is their past truly behind them?

trailers.title: [Teaser] Love Company โปรเจ็กต์นี้ มีเดิมพัน
